question: Which services were used by the customer with details "Hardy Kutch"? Give me the service details.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Services.Service_Details FROM Customers_and_Services JOIN Customers ON Customers_and_Services.Customer_ID = Customers.Customer_ID JOIN Services ON Customers_and_Services.Service_ID = Services.Service_ID WHERE Customers.Customer_Details = 'Hardy Kutch';

back_translation.intent: 获取特定客户的服务详情

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了原始问题中获取特定客户'Hardy Kutch'的服务详情的意图，涉及的表、列和过滤条件均与原始问题匹配。
